products.menuLine: The Yamazaki 12 Year · Japan · $150 · 86 proof (43.0% ABV) · Notes: peach, pineapple

guidance.bestFor: Japanese whisky prestige, collector conversation, refined fruit-oak cigar pairing.
guidance.avoidIf: Budget-only or user needs everyday $40 pour.
guidance.whyRecommend: Recommend when Yamazaki name recognition and refined fruit-mizunara pairing are the point.
guidance.memberBlurb: Yamazaki 12 — peach, mizunara, and quiet spice. The Japanese single malt everyone asks for by name.

products.menuLine: Ron Zacapa 23 · Guatemala · $55 · 80 proof (40.0% ABV) · Notes: honey, raisin

guidance.bestFor: Sweet rum luxury, special occasion cigar, member wants rum without Diplomatico repeat.
guidance.avoidIf: User wants white rum or dry spirits only.
guidance.whyRecommend: Recommend when the member wants luxury sweet rum — honey, raisin, and butterscotch beside a premium cigar.
guidance.memberBlurb: Ron Zacapa 23 — caramel and butterscotch over apricot, nutmeg, leather, and coffee. Solera luxury rum per distillery tasting profile.
